Hero.description: Experts in Adventure Tourism, Corporate Events, and Industrial Rope Access. Certified safety, passion for the limit.
Hero.primaryCta: GET A QUOTE FOR EVENT / TRIP
Hero.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I'm interested in getting a quote for an adventure experience or event.

LegacyAuthority.heading: 20 Years Pushing Boundaries
LegacyAuthority.subheading: We begin a new chapter building upon our solid legacy. Combining passion for outdoor adventure with rigorous safety and technical expertise.

years.title: Years of History
years.desc: Designing outdoor structures, corporate events, and regional expeditions.

games.title: Team Building Games
games.desc: Custom corporate challenges and high-impact adventure activities.

competitions.title: World-Class Level
competitions.desc: Team members competing in global ITRA and Petzl Rope Trip events.

safety.title: Safety Record
safety.desc: Strict standards and certified equipment for industrial and event rigging.

banner.title: World-Class Technical Rigor
banner.description: Our instructors and technicians have proven skills in international rope access and rescue competitions, ensuring zero-risk operations.

AdventureServices.heading: Explore Uncharted Territories
AdventureServices.subheading: We design guided expeditions with top-tier safety standards, certified guides, and high-end gear.
AdventureServices.whatsappPrefix: Hello Alta Cima, I would like information about the activity:

waterfalls.title: Waterfall Canyoning
waterfalls.desc: Experience the thrill of rappelling down waterfalls with certified ropes and safety protocols.

caving.title: Caving & Speleology
caving.desc: Venture into underground caves exploring natural rock formations and subterranean passages.

paragliding.title: Paragliding Flights
paragliding.desc: Soar over mountain landscapes with highly experienced tandem certified pilots.

trekking.title: Mountain Trekking
trekking.desc: Challenging trails and breathtaking views guided by wilderness specialists.

B2BEvents.heading: Mobile Adventure Rigging & Team Building
B2BEvents.subheading: We bring high-adrenaline adventure directly to your corporate facilities, venues, or outdoor sites. Tailored team dynamics for real organizational impact.
B2BEvents.whatsappMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like to request a quote for a corporate event or mobile adventure rigging.

statCard.title: +80 Team Building Challenges
statCard.subtitle: Custom activity portfolio
statCard.desc: An extensive battery of strategic and physical challenges designed to foster leadership, trust, and team cohesion.

rigging.title: Mobile Rope & Wall Rigging
rigging.desc: Mobile climbing walls, ziplines, and rope bridges installed under strict safety and engineering standards.

teambuilding.title: Teambuilding Programs
teambuilding.desc: Integration circuits aimed at effective communication, problem-solving under pressure, and team motivation.

custom.title: Customized Event Logistics
custom.desc: We adapt activities and setups based on participant count, available space, and corporate goals.
custom.highlight: Customized depending on venue and terrain.

IndustrialRope.heading: Rope Access & High-Altitude Services
IndustrialRope.subheading: Bringing competitive technical excellence (Petzl / ITRA) to the industrial and construction sectors with zero-margin safety.
IndustrialRope.whatsappIndustrialMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like information regarding industrial rope access services.
IndustrialRope.whatsappGearMessage: Hello Alta Cima, I would like to see the catalog of specialized high-altitude clothing.

access.title: Difficult Access Solutions
access.desc: Technical intervention on complex structures, facades, and confined spaces using advanced rope access positioning.

maintenance.title: Inspection & Maintenance
maintenance.desc: Structural assessment, technical cleaning, industrial painting, and repairs high above ground without heavy scaffolding.

consulting.title: Rigging & Safety Consulting
consulting.desc: Installation of temporary and permanent lifelines, vertical safety consulting, and custom rescue systems.

IndustrialRope.gearTitle: Specialized Apparel for Rope Access & Outdoors
IndustrialRope.gearDesc: We design heavy-duty pants and technical hoodies tested in extreme conditions. Flexible, abrasion-resistant, and harness-compatible design.
